description:
Verso: Legal document. Oath by Mevorakh b. Naḥum (or possibly Ibn Naḥḥās) concerning payment for a house, of which Abū ʿAlī retains the right to enter. (Information from Goitein’s index card)

Description from PGPID 9223: A different legal document or note, in a different hand, concerning an oath sworn by Mevorakh b. Naḥum(?) concerning the rent of a house its building and Abū Yaʿqūb's purchase of it.
description_he: ורסו: מסמך משפטי; שבועת מבורך בן נחום בעניין תשלום עבור בית שלאבו עלי נשמרת זכות כניסה אליו
